title: Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 4
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|title=''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 4}} {{ComicBook |reprint=1 |image=[[File:CSWTEA4-LEC.png]] |title=''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 4 |writer=[[Steve Gerber]] |penciller=[[Russ Manning]] and [[Rick Hoberg]] |inker= |letterer= |colorist=[[Ray Murtaugh]] |cover artist=[[Rick Hoberg]] |editor=[[Peet Janes]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[November 8]], [[1994]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/93-479/Classic-Star-Wars-The-Early-Adventures-4|text=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures #4}} |pages= |upc= |timeline=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]"[[Tatooine Sojourn]]" is set between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and "[[Princess Leia, Imperial Servant]]," which ''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' places in 0 ABY. |series=''[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures]]'' |issue=4 }} '''''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 4''' was the fourth issue of the ''[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures]]'' series. This particular ''Classic'' series were reformatted and colored reprints of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars (comic strip)|daily newspaper strip]] by [[Russ Manning]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Luke Skywalker is ordered by Rebel Command to abandon a reconnaissance mission. It seems that appearances of unscheduled transport capsules have coincided with the destruction of Rebel bases, and just such a capsule has landed—on Tatooine! Luke must return to his home planet, now a bustling locus of trade and a hotbed of rebellion, to discover how the Empire is finding out about the hidden Rebel bases. He finds the answer, but will it be at the cost of his life?'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures Book 4
TATOOINE SOJOURN |text=Luke Skywalker returns to his homeworld of Tatooine, to find it dramatically changed: a bustling spaceport, a hotbed of Rebellion, but as dangerous as it ever was...}} ==Contents== *"[[Tatooine Sojourn]]" ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 4}} ===Cover gallery=== File:ClassicStarWarsEarlyAdventures4CC.jpg|Dark Horse cover File:CSWTEA4-LEC.png|Legends Epic Collection cover ===Collected in=== *[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (trade paperback)|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' trade paperback]] *''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Newspaper Strips Vol. 1]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends: The Newspaper Strips Omnibus]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/93-479/Classic-Star-Wars-The-Early-Adventures-4|text=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures #4}} {{Interlang |ka=კლასიკური ვარსკვლავური ომები: ადრეული თავგადასავლები 4 }} [[Category:Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures issues|04|Early Adventures 04]]
